description.brazilian: Complete 10 seções diferentes sem tomar qualquer dano.
description.english: Complete 10 different sections without hurting any enemies.
description.french: Terminez 10 sections différentes sans blesser aucun ennemi.
description.german: Schließe 10 verschiedene Abschnitte ab, ohne einem Gegner weh zu tun.
description.italian: Completa 10 sezioni diverse senza ferire nessun nemico.
description.japanese: 敵を傷つけずに10のセクションをクリアする。
description.koreana: 적에게 피해를 주지 않고 구간 10개를 완료하세요.
description.schinese: 在不伤害敌人的情况下完成10个区域。
description.spanish: Completa 10 secciones diferentes sin dañar enemigos.
description.tchinese: 在不傷害敵人的情況下完成10個區域。
description.turkish: Hiçbir düşmana zarar vermeden 10 farklı kısım tamamla.

description.brazilian: Complete 3 seções diferentes ao quebrar todos os objetos.
description.english: Complete 3 different sections by breaking all objects.
description.french: Complétez 3 sections différentes en cassant tous les objets.
description.german: Schließe 3 verschiedene Abschnitte ab, indem du alle Objekte zerstörst.
description.italian: Completa 3 sezioni diverse rompendo tutti gli oggetti.
description.japanese: すべてのオブジェクトを壊しながら3つのセクションをクリアする。
description.schinese: 打碎所有物体完成3个区域。
description.spanish: Completa 3 secciones diferentes rompiendo todos los objetos.
description.tchinese: 打碎所有物體完成3個區域。
description.turkish: Üç farklı kısmı tüm eşyaları kırarak tamamla.

description.brazilian: Complete 3 seções diferentes sem tomar qualquer dano.
description.english: Complete 3 different sections without taking any damage.
description.french: Terminez 3 sections différentes sans subir de dégâts.
description.german: Schließe 3 verschiedene Abschnitte ab, ohne Schaden zu nehmen.
description.italian: Completa 3 sezioni diverse senza subire danni.
description.japanese: ダメージを受けずに3つのセクションをクリアする。
description.koreana: 데미지를 하나도 받지 않고 구간 3개를 완료하세요.
description.schinese: 在不受伤害的情况下完成3个不同区域。
description.spanish: Completa 3 secciones diferentes sin recibir daño.
description.tchinese: 在不受傷害的情況下完成3個不同區域。
description.turkish: Hiç hasar almadan 3 farklı kısım tamamla.

displayName.brazilian: Todos os Cães Vão PAra o Céu
displayName.french: Tous les chiens vont au paradis
displayName.german: Alle Hunde kommen in den Himmel
displayName.italian: Tutti i cani vanno in paradiso
displayName.spanish: Todos los Perros Van al Cielo

description.brazilian: Morra e reviva 20 vezes.
description.french: Mourir et ressusciter 20 fois.
description.german: Stirb und belebe dich 20 Mal wieder.
description.italian: Muori e resuscita 20 volte.
description.japanese: 20回死んで復活する。
description.spanish: Muere y revive 20 veces.

description.brazilian: Compre todas as 27 melhorias.
description.french: Achetez les 27 avantages.
description.italian: Acquista tutti i 27 vantaggi.
description.japanese: パークを27個全部購入する。
description.spanish: Compra las 27 mejoras.

description.brazilian: Compre todas as 4 melhorias do Ataque do Chapéu.
description.english: Buy all 4 Hat Strike upgrade perks.
description.french: Achetez les 4 avantages de mise à niveau Hat Strike.
description.italian: Acquista tutti e 4 i vantaggi di potenziamento Colpo di Cappello.
description.japanese: ハット攻撃アップグレードパークを4つ全部購入する。
description.koreana: 모자 공격 업그레이드 퍼크 4개 모두 구매하세요.
description.schinese: 购买所有4个帽击升级特权。
description.spanish: Compra las 4 mejoras de Golpe de Sombrero.
description.tchinese: 購買所有4個帽擊升級特權。
description.turkish: 4 Şapka Vuruşu geliştirme kıyağının hepsini topla

displayName.japanese: ぜんぜん大丈夫…っぽい？

description.brazilian: Compre Todos os 3 Melhorias de HP.
description.french: Achetez les 3 avantages HP supplémentaires.

description.spanish: Compra las 3 mejoras de vida extra.
description.tchinese: 購買所有3個額外生命值特權。
description.turkish: Üç ekstra can kıyağının hepsini satın al.

description.brazilian: Compre todas as 4 melhorias de marcadores
description.french: Achetez les 4 avantages de la carte.
description.italian: Acquista tutti e 4 i vantaggi delle spille sulla mappa.
description.japanese: マップピンパークを4つ全部購入する。
description.schinese: 购买所有4个地图标记特权。
description.spanish: Compra las 4 mejoras de marcadores de mapa.
description.tchinese: 購買所有4個地圖標記特權。
description.turkish: Dört harita işaretleme kıyağının hepsini satın al.

description.brazilian: Compre todas as 5 habilidades de melhoria.
description.french: Achetez les 5 avantages de mise à niveau des compétences.
description.italian: Acquista tutti e 5 i vantaggi di potenziamento delle abilità.

description.schinese: 购买所有5个技能升级特权。
description.spanish: Compra las 5 mejoras de habilidades.
description.tchinese: 購買所有5個技能升級特權。
description.turkish: Beş yetenek geliştirme kıyağının hepsini satın al.

description.brazilian: Compre ambos melhorias de Dose Extra
description.french: Achetez les deux avantages Extra Shot.
description.italian: Acquista entrambi i vantaggi Extra Shot.
description.japanese: エクストラショットパークを2つ全部購入する。

description.turkish: Ekstra Shot kıyaklarının ikisini birden satın al.

displayName.japanese: わかった、でもまずはコーヒー

description.brazilian: Compre todas as 3 melhorias de grãos de café.
description.french: Achetez les 3 avantages liés aux grains de café.
description.italian: Acquista tutti e 3 i vantaggi legati ai chicchi di caffè.

description.tchinese: 購買所有3個咖啡豆相關特權。
description.turkish: Kahve çekirdekleriyle ilgili üç kıyak satın al.

description.brazilian: Derrote um chefe sem levar qualquer dano.
description.english: Defeat a boss without taking any damage.
description.french: Battez un boss sans subir de dégâts.
description.german: Besiege einen Boss, ohne Schaden zu nehmen.
description.italian: Sconfiggi un boss senza subire danni.
description.japanese: ダメージを一切受けずにボスを倒す。
description.koreana: 데미지를 하나도 받지 않고 보스를 물리치세요.
description.schinese: 在不受任何伤害的情况下击败Boss。
description.spanish: Derrota a un jefe sin recibir daño.
description.tchinese: 在不受任何傷害的情況下擊敗Boss。
description.turkish: Hiç hasar almadan bir boss'u mağlup et.

description.french: Vaincre Juge.
description.italian: Sconfiggi Judger.
